command:
echo "=== TEST vm-claude-hub → vm-openclaw direct ==="
echo "--- port 9119 (openclaw direct) ---"
curl -s --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://192.168.0.199:9119/telegram-webhook
echo ""
echo "--- port 8788 (socat) ---"
curl -s --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://192.168.0.199:8788/telegram-webhook
echo ""

echo "=== CHECK FIREWALL on vm-openclaw ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 '
echo "--- iptables INPUT ---"
sudo iptables -L INPUT -n --line-numbers 2>/dev/null | head -30
echo "--- ufw status ---"
sudo ufw status 2>/dev/null || echo "ufw not active"
echo "--- ports actually accessible ---"
ss -tlnp | grep -E "9119|8788|8787|443|80"
' 2>&1
